# repometrics (Agent Quick Guide)

`repometrics` checks Python repository health with deterministic metrics and scoring.

- README: [/Users/thomasyeoh/repos/repometrics/README.md](/Users/thomasyeoh/repos/repometrics/README.md)
- CLI reference: [/Users/thomasyeoh/repos/repometrics/README.md](/Users/thomasyeoh/repos/repometrics/README.md) (CLI Reference section)

Quickstart:

```bash
repometrics check --json
```
